You must draw some thermos, along which digits ascend from the bulb, using the following constraints: Thermos do not travel diagonally, only orthogonally, making as many turns as needed; corner-marked cells are the bulb for up to four thermos (or two for R9C9); all other cells may be in at most one thermo (ie thermos may only intersect at a corner-marked cell, which will be the bulb for both thermos); the corner-marked clue represents the count of cells (including the clued cell itself) used by thermos whose bulb is in that cell.'}],o:[{ct:[2.2,1.2],w:0.35,h:0.35,c2:#F,r:f,fs:12,te:4},{ct:[4.2,4.2],w:0.35,h:0.35,c2:#F,r:f,fs:12,te:27},{ct:[8.2,8.2],w:0.35,h:0.35,c2:#F,r:f,fs:12,te:5},{ct:[1.2,6.2],w:0.35,h:0.35,c2:#F,r:f,fs:12,te:10}],vd:[{id:'3nWuATfz1rU',publishedAt:'2022-12-07T23:00:03Z',t:'The Wolf Wants Your Thermos',d:1916}]}
